betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Australium§f

§aA trans-schrabidic ultra-heavy element that naturally occurs — and still undergoes fission!§f

§bAustralium§f is a fictional rare, special element visually similar to gold. It is a fully stable trans-schrabidic element that naturally occurs yet undergoes fission — a unique contradiction.

§6Production§f:
§b• Mineral Deposit§f — special ore at §eX: -400, Z: -400§f (~490 avg quantity). Smelting yields 1 nugget; shredding yields 2 powders (more efficient)
§b• Cyclotron§f — bombard §bTennessine Powder§f with §bPlutonium§f → §eAustralium Powder§f

§6SILEX Processing§f (Laser Isotope Separation, 9.0x, BiSmUTh crystal):
§b• Lesser Australium Nugget§f — §e83.3%§f
§b• Greater Australium Nugget§f — §e16.6%§f (used as RBMK fuel)

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Market Gardener§f — shovel that crits when rocket-jumping or falling
§b• Mark III Life Extender§f — armor modification
§b• RBMK Fuel§f — greater australium isotope

§eTip§f: For reliable supply, build the Cyclotron setup for Tennessine + Plutonium. The mineral deposit at -400,-400 is finite (~490 avg) so don't rely on it exclusively!
